channel.title: Ivanti — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Ivanti (ivanti).

item.title: CVE-2026-10727 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: An OS command injection vulnerability in Ivanti EPMM before 12.9.0.1, 12.8.0.3 and 12.7.0.2 versions allows a remote authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root

item.title: CVE-2026-10523 · 9.9 CRITICAL
item.description: An Authentication Bypass vulnerability (CWE-288) in Ivanti Sentry before the R10.5.2, R10.6.2 and R10.7.1 versions allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to create arbitrary administrative accounts and obtain full administrative access

item.title: CVE-2026-10520 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An OS Command Injection vulnerability in Ivanti Sentry before the R10.5.2, R10.6.2 and R10.7.1 versions allows a remote unauthenticated user to achieve root-level remote code execution

item.title: CVE-2026-9614 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: An Improper Access Control vulnerability in Ivanti Neurons for ITSM (cloud and on-premises) allows a remote authenticated attacker to gain administrative access.

item.title: CVE-2026-8992 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An improper certificate validation vulnerability in Ivanti Secure Access Client before 22.8R6 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-8111 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: SQL injection in the web console of Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU6 allows a remote authenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2026-8110 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Incorrect permissions assignment in the agent of Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU6 allows a local authenticated attacker to escalate their privileges.

item.title: CVE-2026-8109 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: An exposed dangerous method on the Core Server of Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU6 allows a remote authenticated attacker to leak access credentials.

item.title: CVE-2026-8051 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: OS command injection in Ivanti Virtual Traffic Manager before version 22.9r4 allows a remote authenticated attacker with admin privileges to achieve remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2026-7432 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: A race condition in Ivanti Secure Access Client before 22.8R6 allows a locally authenticated user to escalate privileges to SYSTEM

item.title: CVE-2026-7431 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: An incorrect permission assignment for critical resource of Ivanti Secure Access Client before 22.8R6 allows a local authenticated user to read or modify sensitive log data via write access to a shared memory section.

item.title: CVE-2026-8043 · 9.6 CRITICAL
item.description: External control of a file name in Ivanti Xtraction before version 2026.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read sensitive files and write arbitrary HTML files to a web directory, leading to information disclosure and possible client-side att…

item.title: CVE-2026-5787 · 8.9 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An Improper Certificate Validation in Ivanti EPMM before versions 12.6.1.1, 12.7.0.1, and 12.8.0.1 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to impersonate registered Sentry hosts and obtain valid CA-signed client certificates.

item.title: CVE-2026-5788 · 7 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An Improper Access Control in Ivanti EPMM before versions 12.6.1.1, 12.7.0.1, and 12.8.0.1 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to invoke arbitrary methods.

item.title: CVE-2026-7821 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Improper certificate validation in Ivanti EPMM before versions 12.6.1.1, 12.7.0.1, and 12.8.0.1 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to enroll a device belonging to a restricted set of unenrolled devices, leading to information disclosure about E…

item.title: CVE-2026-6973 · 7.2 HIGH 💥
item.description: An Improper Input Validation in Ivanti EPMM before versions 12.6.1.1, 12.7.0.1, and 12.8.0.1 allows a remotely authenticated user with administrative access to achieve remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2026-5786 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: An Improper Access Control vulnerability in Ivanti EPMM before versions 12.6.1.1, 12.7.0.1, and 12.8.0.1 allows a remote authenticated attacker to gain administrative access.

item.title: CVE-2026-4914 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Stored XSS in Ivanti N-ITSM before version 2025.4 allows a remote authenticated attacker to obtain limited information from other user sessions. User interaction is required.

item.title: CVE-2026-4913 · 5.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper protection of an alternate path in Ivanti N-ITSM before version 2025.4 allows a remote authenticated attacker to retain access when their account has been disabled.

item.title: CVE-2026-3483 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: An exposed dangerous method in Ivanti DSM before version 2026.1.1 allows a local authenticated attacker to escalate their privileges.

item.title: CVE-2026-1603 · 8.6 HIGH 💥 🌩️
item.description: An authentication bypass in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to leak specific stored credential data.

item.title: CVE-2026-1602 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2026-1340 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️
item.description: A code injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile allowing attackers to achieve unauthenticated remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2026-1281 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️
item.description: A code injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile allowing attackers to achieve unauthenticated remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-13662 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Improper verification of cryptographic signatures in the patch management component of Ivanti Endpoint Manager prior to version 2024 SU4 SR1 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code. User Interaction is required.

item.title: CVE-2025-13661 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: Path traversal in Ivanti Endpoint Manager prior to version 2024 SU4 SR1 allows a remote authenticated attacker to write arbitrary files outside of the intended directory. User interaction is required.

item.title: CVE-2025-13659 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Improper control of dynamically managed code resources in Ivanti Endpoint Manager prior to version 2024 SU4 SR1 allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to write arbitrary files on the server, potentially leading to remote code execution. User inter…

item.title: CVE-2025-10573 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Stored XSS in Ivanti Endpoint Manager prior to version 2024 SU4 SR1 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the context of an administrator session. User interaction is required.

item.title: CVE-2025-10918 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: Insecure default permissions in the agent of Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU4 allows a local authenticated attacker to write arbitrary files anywhere on disk

item.title: CVE-2025-10986 · 4.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Path traversal in the admin panel of Ivanti EPMM before version 12.6.0.2, 12.5.0.4, and 12.4.0.4 allows a remote authenticated attacker with admin privileges to write data in unintended locations on disk.

item.title: CVE-2025-10985 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: OS command injection in the admin panel of Ivanti EPMM before version 12.6.0.2, 12.5.0.4, and 12.4.0.4 allows a remote authenticated attacker with admin privileges to achieve remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-10243 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: OS command injection in the admin panel of Ivanti EPMM before version 12.6.0.2, 12.5.0.4, and 12.4.0.4 allows a remote authenticated attacker with admin privileges to achieve remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-10242 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: OS command injection in the admin panel of Ivanti EPMM before version 12.6.0.2, 12.5.0.4, and 12.4.0.4 allows a remote authenticated attacker with admin privileges to achieve remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-62384 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-62386 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-62383 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-62391 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-62385 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-62387 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-62388 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-62389 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-62390 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-62392 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-11623 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: SQL injection in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU5 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary data from the database.

item.title: CVE-2025-9713 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Path traversal in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU4 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution. User interaction is required.

item.title: CVE-2025-11622 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Insecure deserialization in Ivanti Endpoint Manager before version 2024 SU4 allows a local authenticated attacker to escalate their privileges.

item.title: CVE-2025-55144 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Missing authorization in Ivanti Connect Secure before 22.7R2.9 or 22.8R2, Ivanti Policy Secure before 22.7R1.6, Ivanti ZTA Gateway before 2.8R2.3-723 and Ivanti Neurons for Secure Access before 22.8R1.4 (Fix deployed on 02-Aug-2025) allows a remote a…

item.title: CVE-2025-55143 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Reflected text injection in Ivanti Connect Secure before 22.7R2.9 or 22.8R2, Ivanti Policy Secure before 22.7R1.6, Ivanti ZTA Gateway before 2.8R2.3-723 and Ivanti Neurons for Secure Access before 22.8R1.4 (Fix deployed on 02-Aug-2025) allows a remot…

item.title: CVE-2025-55142 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: Missing authorization in Ivanti Connect Secure before 22.7R2.9 or 22.8R2, Ivanti Policy Secure before 22.7R1.6, Ivanti ZTA Gateway before 2.8R2.3-723 and Ivanti Neurons for Secure Access before 22.8R1.4 (Fix deployed on 02-Aug-2025) allows a remote a…

item.title: CVE-2025-55141 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: Missing authorization in Ivanti Connect Secure before 22.7R2.9 or 22.8R2, Ivanti Policy Secure before 22.7R1.6, Ivanti ZTA Gateway before 2.8R2.3-723 and Ivanti Neurons for Secure Access before 22.8R1.4 (Fix deployed on 02-Aug-2025) allows a remote a…
